segments.text: Bair strings continue—connects into the nair!
segments.original_text: 空後展開継続うまく通っている空Nに続く
さあどうだここの復帰は下から押せていく

segments.text: Platform getup—and the damage is even!
segments.original_text: さあ台上がり気づけばパーセント横並びだ

segments.text: Staying in the air the whole time!

full_text: Bair strings continue—connects into the nair! Recovery incoming—getting pressured from below! Platform getup—and the damage is even! Staying in the air the whole time!

corrections.rule: smash term (だ買い上がり→台上がり)
